---
title: "01.datos_gen1_2.rmd"
author: "Leyre Franquet"
date: "2026-02-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("outputs/tables", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("outputs/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)


library(data.table)

sumstats <- fread(
  "Both/STROKE_snptest_both_clean.txt",
  select = c("rsid", "chromosome", "position", "alleleA", "alleleB",
             "cases_total", "controls_total",
             "frequentist_add_pvalue", "frequentist_add_beta_1", "frequentist_add_se_1")
)

# Quitar p-values NA y no válidos
sumstats <- sumstats[!is.na(frequentist_add_pvalue)]
sumstats <- sumstats[frequentist_add_pvalue > 0 & frequentist_add_pvalue <= 1]

# Asegurar tipos numéricos
sumstats[, chromosome := as.integer(chromosome)]
sumstats[, position := as.integer(position)]

# Resumen rápido (para anexos)
summary_info <- sumstats[, .(
  N_variants = .N,
  N_chr = uniqueN(chromosome),
  p_min = min(frequentist_add_pvalue),
  p_median = median(frequentist_add_pvalue),
  p_max = max(frequentist_add_pvalue)
)]
summary_info
fwrite(summary_info, "outputs/tables/summary_sumstats.tsv", sep = "\t")

```

```{r}
setorder(sumstats, frequentist_add_pvalue)
top10 <- sumstats[1:10]

# Guardar “raw”
fwrite(top10, "outputs/tables/TOP10_snps_STROKE_raw.tsv", sep = "\t")

# Versión presentable
top10_pretty <- copy(top10)
top10_pretty[, P_value := formatC(frequentist_add_pvalue, format = "e", digits = 2)]
top10_pretty[, Beta := round(frequentist_add_beta_1, 4)]
top10_pretty[, SE := round(frequentist_add_se_1, 4)]

top10_pretty <- top10_pretty[, .(
  SNP = rsid, Chr = chromosome, Position = position,
  Allele_A = alleleA, Allele_B = alleleB,
  Cases = cases_total, Controls = controls_total,
  Beta, SE, `P-value` = P_value
)]

fwrite(top10_pretty, "outputs/tables/TOP10_snps_STROKE_pretty.tsv", sep = "\t")
top10_pretty

```
```{r}

library(data.table)

# Asegurar tipos correctos y limpiar
sumstats <- sumstats[!is.na(frequentist_add_pvalue) &
                     frequentist_add_pvalue > 0 & frequentist_add_pvalue <= 1]

sumstats[, chromosome := as.integer(chromosome)]
sumstats[, position := as.numeric(position)]     # <- clave: numeric
sumstats[, LOGP := -log10(frequentist_add_pvalue)]

sumstats <- sumstats[!is.na(chromosome) & !is.na(position)]
setorder(sumstats, chromosome, position)

# Longitud por cromosoma (numeric) + starts (numeric)
chr_info <- sumstats[, .(chr_len = max(position, na.rm = TRUE)), by = chromosome]
setorder(chr_info, chromosome)
chr_info[, chr_start := cumsum(shift(as.numeric(chr_len), fill = 0))]  # <- clave

# Merge y pos_cum (numeric)
sumstats <- merge(sumstats, chr_info[, .(chromosome, chr_start)], by = "chromosome", all.x = TRUE)
sumstats[, pos_cum := as.numeric(position) + as.numeric(chr_start)]    # <- clave

# Centros para etiquetas
chr_centers <- sumstats[, .(center = (min(pos_cum, na.rm = TRUE) + max(pos_cum, na.rm = TRUE))/2),
                        by = chromosome]
setorder(chr_centers, chromosome)

# Guardar figura
dir.create("outputs/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

png("outputs/figures/Manhattan_STROKE_allChr.png", width = 4200, height = 1800, res = 300)
plot(sumstats$pos_cum, sumstats$LOGP,
     pch = 20, cex = 0.35,
     xaxt = "n",
     xlab = "Cromosoma",
     ylab = "-log10(p-value)",
     main = "Manhattan plot (GWAS STROKE)")
axis(1, at = chr_centers$center, labels = chr_centers$chromosome, cex.axis = 0.9)
abline(h = -log10(5e-8), col = "red", lwd = 2)
dev.off()

# Abrir el archivo
browseURL("outputs/figures/Manhattan_STROKE_allChr.png")

```
```{r}
# Q-Q plot
p <- sumstats$frequentist_add_pvalue
p <- p[!is.na(p) & p > 0 & p <= 1]

observed <- -log10(sort(p))
expected <- -log10(ppoints(length(observed)))

# Lambda GC (aprox): usa chi-cuadrado 1 df
chisq <- qchisq(1 - p, df = 1)
lambda_gc <- median(chisq) / qchisq(0.5, df = 1)
lambda_gc

# Guardar lambda
fwrite(data.table(lambda_gc = lambda_gc), "outputs/tables/lambda_GC.tsv", sep = "\t")

# Exportar figura
png("outputs/figures/QQplot_STROKE.png", width = 2000, height = 2000, res = 300)
plot(expected, observed, pch = 20, cex = 0.45,
     xlab = "Expected -log10(p)",
     ylab = "Observed -log10(p)",
     main = paste0("Q-Q plot (lambdaGC = ", round(lambda_gc, 3), ")"))
abline(0, 1, col = "red", lwd = 2)
dev.off()

```

```{r}
gws <- sumstats[frequentist_add_pvalue < 5e-8]
gws[, .N]   # cuántos hay
fwrite(gws, "outputs/tables/SNPs_p_lt_5e-8.tsv", sep = "\t")

# Lead SNPs aproximados por ventanas de 1Mb (±500kb)
lead <- copy(sumstats)
setorder(lead, frequentist_add_pvalue)

lead_snps <- lead[0]  # tabla vacía
taken <- data.table(chromosome=integer(), start=integer(), end=integer())

window <- 500000

for(i in 1:nrow(lead)) {
  chr <- lead$chromosome[i]
  pos <- lead$position[i]
  pval <- lead$frequentist_add_pvalue[i]

  # si ya cae en una región tomada, saltar
  if (nrow(taken[chromosome == chr & pos >= start & pos <= end]) > 0) next

  # si no, añadirlo como lead y marcar región
  lead_snps <- rbind(lead_snps, lead[i])
  taken <- rbind(taken, data.table(chromosome = chr, start = pos - window, end = pos + window))

  if (nrow(lead_snps) >= 20) break  # por ejemplo top 20 loci
}

lead_snps[, LOGP := -log10(frequentist_add_pvalue)]
fwrite(lead_snps, "outputs/tables/LeadSNPs_window500kb_top20.tsv", sep = "\t")
lead_snps[1:10]

```
```{r}
lead1 <- lead_snps[1]
chr <- lead1$chromosome
pos0 <- lead1$position

region <- sumstats[chromosome == chr & position >= (pos0 - 500000) & position <= (pos0 + 500000)]
region[, LOGP := -log10(frequentist_add_pvalue)]

png(sprintf("outputs/figures/LocusPlot_chr%s_%s.png", chr, pos0),
    width = 2400, height = 1400, res = 300)

plot(region$position, region$LOGP,
     pch = 20, cex = 0.5,
     xlab = paste0("Posición chr", chr),
     ylab = "-log10(p)",
     main = paste0("Locus plot chr", chr, " ±500kb alrededor del lead SNP"))
abline(h = -log10(5e-8), col = "red", lwd = 2)
abline(v = pos0, col = "blue", lwd = 2, lty = 2)

dev.off()

```
```{r}
### ANÁLISIS ESPECÍFICO DEL CROMOSOMA X (23) 
## 1 ## HAGO UN MANHATTAN PLOT DEL CROMOSOMA X
chrX <- sumstats[chromosome == 23]
chrX[, LOGP := -log10(frequentist_add_pvalue)]

# resumen
chrX_sum <- data.table(
  N_chrX = nrow(chrX),
  N_sig_chrX = nrow(chrX[frequentist_add_pvalue < 5e-8]),
  min_p_chrX = min(chrX$frequentist_add_pvalue)
)
chrX_sum
fwrite(chrX_sum, "outputs/tables/chrX_summary.tsv", sep="\t")

# plot
png("outputs/figures/Manhattan_chrX.png", width=2400, height=1400, res=300)
plot(chrX$position, chrX$LOGP, pch=20, cex=0.5,
     main="Manhattan plot cromosoma X",
     xlab="Posición (chrX)", ylab="-log10(p)")
abline(h=-log10(5e-8), col="red", lwd=2)
dev.off()

## 2 ## quiero saber cuantos SNPs hay en chrX y cuántos de ellos son significativos
chrX <- sumstats[chromosome == 23]

summary_chrX <- data.table(
  N_total_chrX = nrow(chrX),
  N_sig_5e8 = nrow(chrX[frequentist_add_pvalue < 5e-8]),
  N_sig_1e5 = nrow(chrX[frequentist_add_pvalue < 1e-5]),
  min_p_chrX = min(chrX$frequentist_add_pvalue)
)

summary_chrX

install.packages("gridExtra")   # solo si no lo tienes
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

png("outputs/figures/summary_chrX.png",
    width = 2200,
    height = 800,
    res = 300)

grid.table(summary_chrX,
           rows = NULL,
           theme = ttheme_minimal(base_size = 16))

dev.off()

summary_chrX_pretty <- copy(summary_chrX)
setnames(summary_chrX_pretty,
         old = c("N_total_chrX", "N_sig_5e8", "N_sig_1e5", "min_p_chrX"),
         new = c("Total SNPs (chrX)",
                 "SNPs p < 5×10⁻⁸",
                 "SNPs p < 1×10⁻⁵",
                 "Valor mínimo de p"))
summary_chrX_pretty
summary_chrX_pretty[, `Valor mínimo de p` :=
  formatC(`Valor mínimo de p`, format="e", digits=2)]
png("outputs/figures/summary_chrX_pretty.png",
    width = 2600, height = 1000, res = 300)

grid.table(summary_chrX_pretty,
           rows = NULL,
           theme = ttheme_minimal(base_size = 18))

dev.off()

## 3 ## hago un QQ plot solo para el chrX
pX <- chrX$frequentist_add_pvalue
pX <- pX[pX > 0 & pX <= 1]

observedX <- -log10(sort(pX))
expectedX <- -log10(ppoints(length(observedX)))

png("outputs/figures/QQplot_chrX.png", width=2000, height=2000, res=300)
plot(expectedX, observedX,
     pch=20, cex=0.6,
     xlab="Expected -log10(p)",
     ylab="Observed -log10(p)",
     main="Q-Q plot cromosoma X")
abline(0,1,col="red",lwd=2)
dev.off()

## 4 ## Calculo el lambdaGC solo para el chrX --> Si es lambdaGC en chrX > que el global puede sugerir diferencias sexo-específicas
chisqX <- qchisq(1 - pX, df=1)
lambdaX <- median(chisqX) / qchisq(0.5, df=1)
lambdaX

## 5 ## Comparo el chrX vs autosomas
# Añadir columna indicando tipo de cromosoma
sumstats[, chr_type := ifelse(chromosome == 23, "X", "Autosome")]

comparison <- sumstats[, .(
  N = .N,
  min_p = min(frequentist_add_pvalue),
  median_p = median(frequentist_add_pvalue)
), by = chr_type]

comparison
#para descargarlo en png
dir.create("outputs/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
comparison_pretty <- copy(comparison)

setnames(comparison_pretty,
         old = c("chr_type", "N", "min_p", "median_p"),
         new = c("Tipo de cromosoma",
                 "Número de SNPs",
                 "Valor mínimo de p",
                 "Valor mediano de p"))
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

png("outputs/figures/comparison_chrX_vs_autosomes.png",
    width = 3000,
    height = 1200,
    res = 300)

grid.table(comparison_pretty,
           rows = NULL,
           theme = ttheme_minimal(base_size = 18))

dev.off()
png("outputs/figures/comparison_chrX_vs_autosomes.png",
    width = 3200,
    height = 1400,
    res = 300)

grid.newpage()

pushViewport(viewport(y = 0.9, height = 0.15))
grid.text("Comparación cromosoma X vs autosomas",
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 22, fontface = "bold"))
popViewport()

pushViewport(viewport(y = 0.45, height = 0.75))
grid.table(comparison_pretty,
           rows = NULL,
           theme = ttheme_minimal(base_size = 18))
popViewport()

dev.off()

## 6 ## para buscar regiones enriquecidas en X
chrX_hits <- chrX[frequentist_add_pvalue < 1e-5]
chrX_hits[order(frequentist_add_pvalue)][1:20]

library(data.table)

chrX <- sumstats[chromosome == 23]
chrX <- chrX[frequentist_add_pvalue > 0 & frequentist_add_pvalue <= 1]
chrX[, LOGP := -log10(frequentist_add_pvalue)]

hitsX <- chrX[frequentist_add_pvalue < 1e-5]
nrow(hitsX)
fwrite(hitsX, "outputs/tables/chrX_hits_p_lt_1e-5.tsv", sep="\t")

setorder(hitsX, position)

gap <- 250000  # 250 kb (puedes usar 500 kb si quieres)
hitsX[, region_id := cumsum(c(TRUE, diff(position) > gap))]

setorder(hitsX, position)

gap <- 250000  # 250 kb (puedes usar 500 kb si quieres)
hitsX[, region_id := cumsum(c(TRUE, diff(position) > gap))]
regionsX <- hitsX[, .(
  chr = 23,
  start = min(position),
  end = max(position),
  n_snps = .N,
  lead_pos = position[which.min(frequentist_add_pvalue)],
  lead_snp = rsid[which.min(frequentist_add_pvalue)],
  lead_p = min(frequentist_add_pvalue)
), by = region_id]

setorder(regionsX, lead_p)

regionsX


fwrite(regionsX, "outputs/tables/chrX_regions_enriched_p_lt_1e-5_gap250kb.tsv", sep="\t")

bin_size <- 1000000  # 1 Mb

chrX[, bin := floor(position / bin_size) * bin_size]
enrichment_bins <- chrX[, .(
  n_total = .N,
  n_hits = sum(frequentist_add_pvalue < 1e-5),
  min_p = min(frequentist_add_pvalue)
), by = bin][order(bin)]

fwrite(enrichment_bins, "outputs/tables/chrX_enrichment_bins_1Mb.tsv", sep="\t")

png("outputs/figures/chrX_enrichment_bins_1Mb.png", width=2600, height=1400, res=300)
plot(enrichment_bins$bin, enrichment_bins$n_hits, type="h",
     xlab="Posición (bins de 1Mb en chrX)", ylab="N SNPs con p < 1e-5",
     main="Enriquecimiento de señal en cromosoma X (p < 1e-5)")
dev.off()

regions_top <- regionsX[1:min(3, .N)]
regions_top

make_locus_plot <- function(chr, center_pos, window=500000, outname="locus.png"){
  reg <- chrX[position >= (center_pos - window) & position <= (center_pos + window)]
  reg[, LOGP := -log10(frequentist_add_pvalue)]
  
  png(outname, width=2400, height=1400, res=300)
  plot(reg$position, reg$LOGP, pch=20, cex=0.5,
       xlab=paste0("Posición chr", chr),
       ylab="-log10(p)",
       main=paste0("Locus chr", chr, " ±", window/1000, "kb alrededor del lead"))
  abline(h=-log10(5e-8), col="red", lwd=2)
  abline(v=center_pos, col="blue", lwd=2, lty=2)
  dev.off()
}

for(i in 1:nrow(regions_top)){
  make_locus_plot(
    chr = 23,
    center_pos = regions_top$lead_pos[i],
    window = 500000,
    outname = sprintf("outputs/figures/Locus_chrX_%s.png", regions_top$lead_pos[i])
  )
}

## 7 ## PARA EVALUAR LA DIRECCIÓN DEL EFECTO EN X
chrX[, sign := ifelse(frequentist_add_beta_1 > 0, "Positive", "Negative")]

table(chrX$sign)
chrX_sig <- chrX[frequentist_add_pvalue < 1e-5]
table(chrX_sig$sign)
binom.test(9, 10, p=0.5) # me da un p-value de 0.02 < 0.05

## 8 ## para analizar si x tiene más o menos señal de la esperada
propX <- nrow(chrX[frequentist_add_pvalue < 1e-5]) / nrow(chrX)
propAuto <- nrow(sumstats[chromosome != 23 & frequentist_add_pvalue < 1e-5]) /
            nrow(sumstats[chromosome != 23])

propX
propAuto # esto me suguere que: En el cromosoma X, la proporción de SNPs con p < 1e-5 es aproximadamente 2.4 veces mayor que en los autosomas -->  el chr X presenta una mayor densidad relativa de señaels en comparacion con los autosomas

x_success <- nrow(chrX[frequentist_add_pvalue < 1e-5])
x_total <- nrow(chrX)

auto_success <- nrow(sumstats[chromosome != 23 & frequentist_add_pvalue < 1e-5])
auto_total <- nrow(sumstats[chromosome != 23])

prop.test(c(x_success, auto_success),
          c(x_total, auto_total)) # me da un p value = 0.01176 < 0.05 --> Hay evidencia estadística de enriquecimiento de señal sugestiva en el cromosoma X respecto a los autosomas.

```

```{r}
### estratificar el chrX por sexo
## primero importamos el dataset de la mastertable
mt_gen_1_2 <- generacion1_2_mastertable
rm(generacion1_2_mastertable)

table(mt_gen_1_2$Gender, useNA = "ifany")
library(dplyr)

mt_gen_1_2 <- mt_gen_1_2 %>%
  mutate(Gender = trimws(tolower(Gender)))  # "female" / "male"

females <- mt_gen_1_2 %>%
  filter(Gender == "female") %>%
  select(FID, IID) %>%
  distinct()

males <- mt_gen_1_2 %>%
  filter(Gender == "male") %>%
  select(FID, IID) %>%
  distinct()

nrow(females)
nrow(males)

write.table(females, "keep_females.txt",
            row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

write.table(males, "keep_males.txt",
            row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

mt_gen_1_2 %>%
  count(Gender) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Gender, y = n, fill = Gender)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(pct, "%")),
            vjust = -0.5,
            size = 5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribución por sexo en GEN1-2",
       x = "Sexo",
       y = "Número de individuos")

library(dplyr)

mt_gen_1_2 %>%
  group_by(Gender) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    casos = sum(ISQ_stroke == "Yes"),
    proporcion = round(100 * casos / total, 2)
  )

tabla <- table(mt_gen_1_2$Gender, mt_gen_1_2$ISQ_stroke)

chisq.test(tabla)

install.packages("epitools")
library(epitools)

oddsratio(tabla)

mt_gen_1_2$ISQ_stroke <- factor(mt_gen_1_2$ISQ_stroke,
                                levels = c("No", "Yes"))

modelo2 <- glm(ISQ_stroke ~ Gender + Age,
               data = mt_gen_1_2,
               family = binomial)

mt_gen_1_2$ISQ_stroke <- factor(mt_gen_1_2$ISQ_stroke,
                                levels = c("No", "Yes"))

mt_gen_1_2$Gender <- relevel(factor(mt_gen_1_2$Gender), ref = "female")

modelo2 <- glm(ISQ_stroke ~ Gender + Age,
               data = mt_gen_1_2,
               family = binomial)
edad_media <- mean(mt_gen_1_2$Age, na.rm = TRUE)

newdata <- data.frame(
  Gender = c("female", "male"),
  Age = edad_media
)

newdata$probabilidad <- predict(modelo2,
                                newdata,
                                type = "response")
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(newdata, aes(x = Gender, y = probabilidad, fill = Gender)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  labs(title = "Probabilidad ajustada de ictus por sexo",
       y = "Probabilidad estimada") +
  theme_minimal()


modelo2 <- glm(ISQ_stroke ~ Gender + Age, data = df, family = binomial)
summary(modelo2)
edades <- seq(min(df$Age), max(df$Age), length.out = 100)

newdata2 <- expand.grid(
  Age = edades,
  Gender = factor(c("female", "male"), levels = c("female", "male"))
)

newdata2$prob <- predict(modelo2, newdata = newdata2, type = "response")
ggplot(newdata2, aes(x = Age, y = prob, color = Gender)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Probabilidad de ictus según edad y sexo (modelo ajustado)",
       y = "Probabilidad estimada", x = "Edad") +
  theme_minimal()



OR <- exp(cbind(OR = coef(modelo2), confint(modelo2)))
OR
# Extraer OR e IC
OR_tab <- as.data.frame(exp(cbind(OR = coef(modelo2),
                                  confint(modelo2))))

OR_tab$Variable <- rownames(OR_tab)

# Quitamos el intercept (no interesa)
OR_tab <- OR_tab[OR_tab$Variable != "(Intercept)", ]

OR_tab

library(ggplot2)

p_forest <- ggplot(OR_tab,
                   aes(x = Variable,
                       y = OR,
                       ymin = `2.5 %`,
                       ymax = `97.5 %`)) +
  geom_pointrange(size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Odds Ratio ajustado (modelo logístico)",
       y = "Odds Ratio (IC 95%)",
       x = "")

p_forest
ggsave("forest_plot_OR_ajustado.pdf",
       plot = p_forest,
       width = 6,
       height = 4)


```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
summary(df$Age)

df %>%
  mutate(grupo_edad = cut(Age, breaks = c(0,40,50,60,70,80,90,120), right = FALSE)) %>%
  count(grupo_edad)
p_hist <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Age, fill = ISQ_stroke)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, position = "stack") +
  facet_wrap(~Gender, ncol = 1) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribución de edades (por sexo) y estado de ictus",
       x = "Edad", y = "N")

p_hist


df$pred <- predict(modelo2, type = "response")

calib <- df %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(Age, breaks = c(0,40,50,60,70,80,90,120), right = FALSE)) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    obs = mean(ISQ_stroke == "Yes"),
    pred = mean(pred),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

calib
p_calib <- ggplot(calib, aes(x = bin)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = obs), size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = obs, group = 1)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = pred), shape = 1, size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred, group = 1), linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Calibración por grupos de edad",
       subtitle = "Puntos sólidos = observado | círculos vacíos = predicho (media del modelo)",
       x = "Grupo de edad", y = "Proporción / probabilidad") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1))

p_calib


edades <- seq(min(df$Age), max(df$Age), length.out = 200)

newdata2 <- expand.grid(
  Age = edades,
  Gender = levels(df$Gender)
)

pred_link <- predict(modelo2, newdata = newdata2, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)

newdata2 <- newdata2 %>%
  mutate(
    fit = pred_link$fit,
    se  = pred_link$se.fit,
    prob = plogis(fit),
    lo = plogis(fit - 1.96*se),
    hi = plogis(fit + 1.96*se)
  )
p_curve_ci <- ggplot(newdata2, aes(x = Age, y = prob, color = Gender, fill = Gender)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Probabilidad estimada de ictus según edad y sexo",
       subtitle = "Bandas = IC 95% del modelo",
       x = "Edad", y = "Probabilidad estimada") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1))

p_curve_ci


modelo_int <- glm(ISQ_stroke ~ Gender * Age, data = df, family = binomial)

anova(modelo2, modelo_int, test = "Chisq")
summary(modelo_int)

edad0 <- 50
new_compare <- data.frame(Age = c(50, 60, 70), Gender = "female")
new_compare$prob <- predict(modelo2, newdata = new_compare, type = "response")

OR_10 <- exp(coef(modelo2)[["Age"]] * 10)

p_age2 <- ggplot(new_compare, aes(x = factor(Age), y = prob)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(prob*100,1), "%")), vjust = -0.5, size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 0.9,
           label = paste0("Cada 10 años: odds × ", round(OR_10, 2)),
           color = "red", size = 3.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Incremento estimado del riesgo de ictus\nsegún la edad (modelo ajustado)",
       x = "Edad", y = "Probabilidad estimada") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1))

p_age2

ggsave("01_hist_edades.pdf", p_hist, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("02_calibracion.pdf", p_calib, width = 8, height = 5)
ggsave("03_curva_sexo_ci.pdf", p_curve_ci, width = 8, height = 5)
ggsave("04_barras_50_60_70.pdf", p_age2, width = 8, height = 5)
install.packages("ragg")
library(ragg)

png("03_curva_sexo_ci.png", width = 2400, height = 1500, res = 300)
print(p_curve_ci)
dev.off()


```
```{r}
df$grupo_edad_10 <- cut(
  df$Age,
  breaks = seq(floor(min(df$Age, na.rm = TRUE)/10)*10,
               ceiling(max(df$Age, na.rm = TRUE)/10)*10,
               by = 10),
  right = FALSE
)
library(dplyr)

df %>%
  count(grupo_edad_10) %>%
  arrange(grupo_edad_10)
df %>%
  count(grupo_edad_10, Gender) %>%
  arrange(grupo_edad_10)
df %>%
  count(grupo_edad_10, ISQ_stroke) %>%
  arrange(grupo_edad_10)
ggplot(df, aes(x = grupo_edad_10)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Número de pacientes por franjas de edad (10 años)",
       x = "Grupo de edad",
       y = "Número de pacientes") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```
